# transit

```go
import "github.com/shaobaobaoer/solarsage-mcp/pkg/transit"
```

Package transit implements the transit event detection engine supporting seven chart\-type combinations \(natal transits, progressions, solar arcs, and their cross\-references\).

CalcTransitEvents is the primary entry point, accepting a TransitCalcInput that specifies the date range, bodies, and event types to scan. Results are independently validated at 100% accuracy \(247/247 reference events\).

```go
func CalcTransitEvents(input TransitCalcInput) ([]models.TransitEvent, error)
```

CalcTransitEvents computes all transit events in the given time range

<a name="MonoInterval"></a>
## type [MonoInterval](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/transit/transit.go#L58-L61>)

MonoInterval represents a monotonic longitude interval \(no station inside\)

```go
type MonoInterval struct {
    Start float64
    End   float64
}
```

<a name="StationInfo"></a>
## type [StationInfo](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/transit/transit.go#L52-L55>)

StationInfo represents a retrograde/direct station

```go
type StationInfo struct {
    JD          float64
    IsDirecting bool // true = station direct (retro -> direct)
}
```

<a name="TransitCalcInput"></a>
## type [TransitCalcInput](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/transit/transit.go#L64-L89>)

TransitCalcInput holds all inputs for transit calculation

```go
type TransitCalcInput struct {
    NatalLat     float64
    NatalLon     float64
    NatalJD      float64
    NatalPlanets []models.PlanetID

    TransitLat float64
    TransitLon float64

    StartJD float64
    EndJD   float64

    TransitPlanets []models.PlanetID

    ProgressionsConfig *models.ProgressionsConfig
    SolarArcConfig     *models.SolarArcConfig

    SpecialPoints *models.SpecialPointsConfig
    EventConfig   models.EventConfig

    OrbConfigTransit      models.OrbConfig
    OrbConfigProgressions models.OrbConfig
    OrbConfigSolarArc     models.OrbConfig

    HouseSystem models.HouseSystem
}
```
